events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes form build & bracing work on a commercial project. The observed field condition is "blowout evidence" — meaning there's evidence that a form blowout has occurred. The work is rough-complete stage. ACI 347 is the reference (Guide to Formwork for Concrete).

Blowout evidence is a serious defect — it indicates the formwork failed or is failing under concrete pressure. This is a safety issue and non-compliant with ACI 347 requirements for formwork design and bracing.

Decision: fail (dangerous/non-compliant)
Risk: high or critical — blowout evidence suggests formwork failure which is a serious safety hazard
Work_stage: rough-complete
Component_conditions: installed-defective, failed, non-compliant
Percent_complete: 70 (as stated, until defects corrected)
Value: 0 (not asked for a specific numeric reading)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: blowout evidence indicates formwork failure/inadequate bracing
Actions: stop work, inspect/repair forms, redesign bracing per ACI 347, re-inspect
References: ACI 347
